jd_text: Global Head of Sales (Cross-Border Payments | Fintech Infrastructure) Location: Dubai, UAE Compensation: Highly competitive base + uncapped commission + equity potential About the Company A high-growth, venture-backed fintech building next-generation cross-border payments infrastructure. The Opportunity This is a global leadership role reporting directly to the CRO. You will own and execute the global revenue strategy across EMEA, APAC, and the Americas , building and scaling a high-performing international sales organisation. This is not a standard Head of role. You will be expected to operate as a true heavy hitter, bringing experience, relationships, and a proven track record of scaling revenue in high-growth fintech environments. Key Responsibilities Own global revenue strategy across all regions Scale and lead international sales teams across EMEA, APAC, and Americas Build structure, processes, and operating cadence across the commercial function Drive aggressive revenue growth aligned to company expansion targets Develop and execute global go-to-market strategy Lead enterprise and platform sales targeting fintechs, marketplaces, and global merchants Embed data, automation, and AI into sales processes and performance tracking Partner closely with Product, Marketing, and Leadership on expansion strategy Build and maintain senior relationships with key clients and partners globally Hire, coach, and develop a world-class sales organisation What We’re Looking For Proven experience as a Global Head, Regional Head, or equivalent senior commercial leader Track record scaling revenue and teams in a high-growth fintech or payments environment Experience within cross-border payments, FX, or financial infrastructure Strong background in institutional sales , with exposure to enterprise and platform clients Experience in challenger or scaling fintech environments Demonstrated ability to build and implement scalable sales processes and structures Strong understanding of data-led sales, automation, and AI-driven sales optimisation Existing network and relationships within fintech, payments, and enterprise ecosystems Experience leading globally distributed teams Why Join Opportunity to shape and scale a global fintech at a critical growth stage Direct impact on revenue, strategy, and international expansion Work alongside top-tier investors and leadership Highly competitive compensation with strong upside
